messages.content: help me cite super mario bro in in-text citation and reference list, Format for reference list is Developer. Year. Title of Game/ App. Edition, version. Publisher, year. Operating system required. Additional information [if relevant].

In-text citation: In "Super Mario Bros." (1985), players control Mario as he navigates various worlds to save Princess Toadstool.

Reference list: Nintendo. (1985). Super Mario Bros. Nintendo Entertainment System, version 1.0. Nintendo, 1985. Nintendo Entertainment System. 

Note: Additional information can be added if relevant, such as the platform on which the game is played or any special features.

help me cite Nintendo in-text citation and reference list, Format for reference list is Developer. Year. Title of Game/ App. Edition, version. Publisher, year. Operating system required. Additional information [if relevant].

In-text citation: According to Nintendo (2021), the Switch console has sold over 80 million units worldwide.

Reference list: Nintendo. (2021). Nintendo Switch. Nintendo Switch, version 2.0. Nintendo, 2021. Nintendo Switch. 

Note: Additional information can be added if relevant, such as the specific model or any special features.

help me cite the game company "Nintendo" in-text citation and reference list, Format for reference list is Developer. Year. Title of Game/ App. Edition, version. Publisher, year. Operating system required. Additional information [if relevant].

In-text citation: Nintendo is a popular game company known for its innovative consoles and iconic game franchises (Nintendo, n.d.).

Reference list: Nintendo. (n.d.). Nintendo. Nintendo. 

Note: Since "Nintendo" is not a specific game or app, the reference list simply includes the developer and company name. If citing a specific game or app developed by Nintendo, please follow the format provided in previous examples.

help me cite the game company “Nintendo” in-text citation and reference list,

In-text citation: Nintendo is one of the largest and most influential game companies in the world (Nintendo, n.d.).

Reference list: Nintendo. (n.d.). Nintendo. Nintendo.

Note: Since "Nintendo" is not a specific game or app, the reference list simply includes the developer and company name. If citing a specific game or app developed by Nintendo, please follow the format provided in previous examples.
use this Format for reference list is Developer. Year. Title of Game/ App. Edition, version. Publisher, year. Operating system required. Additional information [if relevant]. to cite Nintendo for me

Developer: Nintendo

Year: N/A (if you are referring to the company as a whole)

Title: Nintendo

Edition: N/A

Version: N/A

Publisher: Nintendo

reference  a company as whole

To reference a company as a whole, you can use the following format for the reference list:

Developer: Company Name

Year: N/A (if you are referring to the company as a whole)

Title: Company Name

Edition: N/A

Version: N/A

Publisher: Company Name

Year: N/A (if you are referring to the company as a whole)

Operating system required: N/A

Additional information (if relevant): N/A

Reference List example:

Nintendo. Nintendo. Nintendo.

In-text citation: Nintendo is a pioneer in the gaming industry, having created many beloved franchises and consoles (Nintendo, n.d.).

Reference list: 

Developer: Nintendo

Year: N/A (if referring to the company as a whole)

Title: Nintendo

Edition: N/A

Version: N/A

Publisher: Nintendo

Year: N/A (if referring to the company as a whole)

Operating system required: N/A

Additional information (if relevant): N/A

Note: Since "Nintendo" is not a specific game or app, the reference list simply includes the developer and company name with "N/A" for year, edition, version, and operating system required. In-text citations can use a similar format, with "n.d." indicating "no date" for reference to the company as a whole.
